case_title: GROSS, AARON THIRD EAR PRODUCTIONS, INC. VS HASSRICK, PHIL LOST FRONTIERS

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HASSRICK, PHIL  LOST FRONTIERS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27020, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROSS, AARON THIRD EAR PRODUCTIONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASSRICK, PHIL  LOST FRONTIERS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $107.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,607.00, DEFENDANT WAIVED IMPROPER VENUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
